item.title: CFTC defends its right to prediction market enforcement as states challenge platforms
item.description: CFTC Chairman Michael Selig said the agency has filed an amicus brief to assert its authority over prediction market enforcement and regulation.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: General Mills, Southwest, Genuine Parts, Norwegian Cruise Line & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

item.title: Hedge fund manager Rob Citrone is short U.S. stocks. Here's why
item.description: The Discovery Capital Management founder and portfolio manager said capital expenditures on AI are risks to major U.S. companies.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Warner Bros. Discovery, Paramount Skydance, Masimo, Danaher & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: In bitcoin price plummet, ETF flows are down but aren't signaling 'crypto winter' investor panic
item.description: As the price of bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies has crashed, exchange-traded funds have seen outflows, but ETF selling doesn't look like investor p...
